title: senecio breviscapus
intro: Senecio breviscapus, also known as the Chinese skullcap or Qianghuo, is a type of flowering plant native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve circulation. The plant has been shown to have various health benefits, including anti-anxiety and anti-depressant effects, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. Senecio breviscapus can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, and infusions, which are commonly used to treat a range of health conditions, including respiratory problems and digestive issues.
